note: sed -i '' macOS syntax fails silently on Linux. All .ralphrc updates were no-ops. Fixed with portable sed -i.
exec replaced shell — no duration/budget/checkpoint enforcement possible. Replaced with background process + supervisor poll loop.
RALPH_SESSION_BUDGET, MARATHON_DURATION_HOURS, MARATHON_CHECKPOINT_INTERVAL written to .ralphrc but ralph_loop.sh does NOT read them. Supervisor must enforce externally.
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY overrides Claude Code OAuth with invalid key causing 'Fix external API key' error. Marathon must unset ANTHROPIC_API_KEY before launching ralph.
CLAUDECODE env var must be unset to avoid 'nested session' detection when marathon.sh is launched from within Claude Code.
ralph-enable --force overwrites .ralphrc and .gitignore with defaults. Always restore custom settings after running ralph-enable.
((CHECKPOINT_COUNT++)) with set -e: when count is 0, arithmetic returns 0 → exit code 1 → script dies. Use $((x + 1)) instead.
First successful loop: ~2 min, 1 loop, 6 calls, $0.15 spend. session_spend_usd was 0 in status.json (ralph may not track it in this version).
hg-mcp: 72 loops, 87.5% commit rate, $0.35/loop Sonnet avg, $0.95/loop Opus. Cost estimates were 7x off initially. Must validate empirically.
mesmer: batch-similar-tasks (MAX_TASKS_PER_BATCH=3, MAX_LINES_PER_BATCH=600) dramatically improves throughput. Pre-flight grep checks prevent function name conflicts.
mesmer: TaskSynthesizer auto-generates new tasks when fix_plan.md reaches 100%. Enables perpetual loops. Jaccard dedup threshold 0.75 prevents task duplication.
mesmer: Opus budget downgrade at 70% spend (RALPH_BUDGET_DOWNGRADE_PCT=70). Max 15 Opus calls per 5hr window. Cost alarm if 5-loop avg exceeds $8/loop.
claudekit: perpetual-loop.sh uses CADENCE=4 (check improvements every 4 cycles). FinOps middleware enforces budget breaches → automatic loop stop.
claudekit: Verify task stuck-loop when make check passes with no changes. Fix: mark_done immediately after successful check. Saves 10-15% cycle time.
hg-mcp: cost_ledger.jsonl tracks per-loop cost with model, duration, productive flag. budget.json tracks total spent/remaining with hard stop threshold.
